description_long: This house features a modern, multi-level design with a mix of flat and slightly elevated roof sections, and a combination of gray and wooden exterior finishes. Large windows dominate the facade, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic, while several balconies and terraces offer outdoor living spaces. The structure includes a rooftop deck with a circular hot tub, a ground-level patio with a pool, and a separate outdoor dining area. The main entrance is marked by a wooden door and is set into a recessed section of the building, adding depth to the facade. The house is surrounded by minimal landscaping, emphasizing clean lines and geometric forms. The overall layout is asymmetrical, with various volumes and projections creating visual interest from every angle.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large windows, and multiple terraces, featuring a rooftop hot tub and a ground-level pool. The exterior combines gray and wood finishes with asymmetrical, geometric forms.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the rooftop hot tub; the facade is dominated by gray and wood finishes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rooftop hot tub, upper terraces, and the extended pool area at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, outdoor dining area, and the house's layered, asymmetrical structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, additional windows, and the overall blocky, modern form of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a wooden door, no porch, and minimal decorative elements
